name: TensorFlow Serving Prediction Request
description: Structure documentation for a prediction inference request to TensorFlow Serving REST API.

fields.name: signature_name
fields.description: Optional name of the serving signature to use. Omit to use the default serving signature.

fields.name: instances
fields.description: Row format input. An array of individual inputs. Use this when all inputs share the same first (0th) tensor dimension.

items.description: Single input - scalar, list, or named-tensor object

fields.name: inputs
fields.description: Column format input. A map of input tensor names to arrays. Use this when inputs have different 0th dimensions.

additionalProperties.description: Array of values for a named input tensor

notes: Use 'instances' (row format) when all tensor inputs share the same batch dimension
Use 'inputs' (column format) when tensor inputs have different sizes
Only one of 'instances' or 'inputs' should be provided per request
Binary data should be encoded as base64 JSON strings
